notes: Solid Space Invaders implementation with proper alien marching, shields, mystery ship, waves, and lives system; minor issue with initTitleMarchState called before declaration (hoisting works but risky), and shield pixel rendering is functional but notch logic slightly off, overall a well-rounded build.
Critical bug: Alien movement interval is calculated in milliseconds but compared against a delta-time in seconds, causing aliens to move only once every 13 minutes.

A solid playable Space Invaders clone with title/pause/game-over flow, shields, waves, mystery ship, and audio, but movement cadence, simplified visuals/behaviors, and some non-classic gameplay details keep it well short of perfection.
